mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_confirm_action (confirm_token, trace_id, user_id, action_type, action_payload, status, expire_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{confirmToken}, #{traceId}, #{userId}, #{actionType}, #{actionPayload}, #{status}, #{expireAt}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE agent_confirm_action SET status = #{status}, confirmed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE confirm_token = #{confirmToken}
